description_long: This coatrack is constructed primarily from wood and features a central vertical post with multiple horizontal arms extending outward at the top, each arm capped with rounded ends and subtle yellow accent stripes for visual interest. The midsection and lower section of the rack have additional horizontal bars, each equipped with notched or forked hooks designed to hold coats, hats, or bags. The base is wide and sturdy, with interlocking wooden feet that provide stability and prevent tipping. The overall design is functional and minimalist, with a natural wood finish and a few engraved or printed gold-colored brand markings on the horizontal bars. The hooks and arms are symmetrically arranged, maximizing hanging capacity while maintaining a balanced appearance. There are no visible umbrella holders or ornate decorative elements, emphasizing practicality and clean lines.
description: A wooden coatrack with multiple horizontal arms and hooks, featuring a natural finish and subtle yellow accents. Its sturdy, symmetrical design maximizes hanging space while maintaining a minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set of horizontal arms and hooks, with yellow accents on the top arms and visible brand marking on the middle bar.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the notched hooks and the symmetrical arrangement of the arms, with less visible branding.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the depth of the arms and hooks, and the interlocking structure of the base.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the forked hooks and the overall symmetry, with a different angle on the base and arms.
